# Principles of Scientific Writing

> A style guide for scientific writing, focused on writing about statistical data analysis.

## Pages

- [References](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/references.llms.md)
- [Word choice](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/word-choice.llms.md)
- [multiple-outcomes](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/paper-organization/multiple-outcomes.llms.md)
- [Conciseness](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/conciseness.llms.md)
- [Citations and evidence](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/citations-evidence.llms.md)
- [Defining terms clearly](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/defining-terms.llms.md)
- [Paper organization](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/paper-organization.llms.md)
- [Summary](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/chapters/summary.llms.md)
- [Principles of Scientific Writing](https://d-morrison.github.io/psw/index.llms.md)
